subject: Daylight_v0.6

formula.cap_ceiling: C = min(active hard-cap maximum_score values, or 10000 if none are active)

hard_caps.name: no_independent_external_reviews_tracked
hard_caps.reason: ExternalReviewClaim remains 0 and no independent signed review set is tracked.

hard_caps.name: no_integrated_public_authority
hard_caps.reason: Certificate, revocation, log, install, witness, publish, and trust authority are not integrated.

hard_caps.name: no_production_authority_publish_authority_or_trust_gate
hard_caps.reason: ProductionAllowed remains 0 and no assembly-enforced publish/trust authority gate exists.

hard_caps.name: no_runtime_containment_enforcement
hard_caps.reason: RuntimeContainmentClaim remains 0 and no OS-level containment enforcement is claimed.

hard_caps.name: no_whole_system_post_quantum_safety_claim
hard_caps.reason: WholeSystemPostQuantumSafetyClaim remains 0 and the repo does not claim whole-system PQ safety.

components.name: lawful_review_boundary_and_claim_control
components.reason: The evaluation is defensive, local, claim-bounded, and explicitly rejects production, runtime containment, whole-system PQ-safety, and external-review claims.

components.name: specification_schema_transcript_and_kdf_surface
components.reason: The v6 schema, transcript labels, KDF labels, rejection stages, schema-freeze evidence, and reference docs are pinned and checked.

components.name: reproducible_corpora_and_kat_bundle
components.reason: The repo tracks deterministic fixture vectors, negative corpora, provider-backed vectors, vector-agreement evidence, and a KAT reproduction bundle.

components.name: fail_closed_implementation_and_negative_behavior
components.reason: Public-precheck denial, private-path mutation failures, and fail-closed Open behavior are tested, with unresolved authority integration kept as a blocker.

components.name: cryptographic_provider_evidence
components.reason: Provider-backed ML-KEM-1024, DHKEM(P-384,HKDF-SHA384), HKDF, and AEAD evidence exists, but the v0.6 M1 artifact profile and production authority remain non-production.

components.name: formal_model_and_smt_support
components.reason: The repo has an expanded M4 symbolic model and Z3-backed predicate proof, while preserving the need for independent formal-methods and constant-time review.

components.name: review_packet_provenance_and_verifier_automation
components.reason: The repo tracks a review packet, signed external-review verifier, strict review-set manifest verifier, authority verifier, and composed 1000 claim gate.

components.name: integrated_public_authority_and_trust_model
components.reason: Authority candidate verification exists, but integrated certificate, revocation, log, install, witness, publish, and trust authority remain unresolved.

components.name: independent_external_peer_review
components.reason: No independent signed external reviews are tracked.

components.name: production_runtime_containment_and_deployment
components.reason: No production authority, runtime containment, deployment authority, or production-readiness claim exists.

non_claims: this model does not replace the Daylight 975/1000 research scorecard
this model is not an external review
this model does not raise the Daylight research score
this model is not production authority
this model does not make Daylight production-ready
this model does not claim runtime containment
this model does not claim whole-system post-quantum safety
this model is not legal advice
